text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Kids these days put pictures of their food on the
world wide web, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, have I got the perfect dishes for that!
Everyone on Umastagram will be sooo jelly!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You wanna know? Tiramisu and nata de coco! Serve 'em with Italian food, and you've got the hottest spread around!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you'll get lots of "Looks" with that
combo!
